'''mashuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamacueca|zamacueca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamacueca|zamacueca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mashuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshiyith|mæshiyith]] || [[word:mæshiyij|mæshiyij]] || [[word:mæshiyish|mæshiyish]] || [[word:mæshiyi|mæshiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashushuyuth|mashushuyuth]] || [[word:mashushuyuj|mashushuyuj]] || [[word:mashushuyush|mashushuyush]] || [[word:mashushuyu|mashushuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashuyuth|mashuyuth]] || [[word:mashuyuj|mashuyuj]] || [[word:mashuyush|mashuyush]] || [[word:mashuyu|mashuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashufyuth|mashufyuth]] || [[word:mashufyuj|mashufyuj]] || [[word:mashufyush|mashufyush]] || [[word:mashufyuf|mashufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashuyuthu|mashuyuthu]] || [[word:mashuyuju|mashuyuju]] || [[word:mashuyushu|mashuyushu]] || [[word:mashuyuku|mashuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashuyuth|mashuyuth]] || [[word:mashuyuj|mashuyuj]] || [[word:mashuyush|mashuyush]] || [[word:mashuyu|mashuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashuyuthul|mashuyuthul]] || [[word:mashuyujul|mashuyujul]] || [[word:mashuyushul|mashuyushul]] || [[word:mashuyukul|mashuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashuyuthuthu|mashuyuthuthu]] || [[word:mashuyujuju|mashuyujuju]] || [[word:mashuyushushu|mashuyushushu]] || [[word:mashuyuku|mashuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashuyuthun|mashuyuthun]] || [[word:mashuyujun|mashuyujun]] || [[word:mashuyushun|mashuyushun]] || [[word:mashuyukun|mashuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashuyuthuoro|mashuyuthuoro]] || [[word:mashuyujuoro|mashuyujuoro]] || [[word:mashuyushuoro|mashuyushuoro]] || [[word:mashuyukuoro|mashuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
